zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Tucker於1672年出生在美國維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治時，她的父親Robert Tucker20歲，母親Elizabeth Coleman16歲。她於1684年與William Pettypool Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1726年3月14日在她的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州哈利法可哈利法可哈利法可 堂 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Tucker于1672年出生在美国弗吉尼亚州普林斯 喬治时，她的父亲Robert Tucker20岁，母亲Elizabeth Coleman16岁。她于1684年与William Pettypool Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1726年3月14日在她的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州哈利法可哈利法可哈利法可 堂 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Tucker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name from Middle English tuker(e), toker(e) ‘tucker, fuller’, a derivative of tuken ‘to torment, beat’ (Old English tūcian), for someone who fulled and finished cloth. This name for the occupation was characteristic of the West Country. Compare Fuller and Walker and see also Tuckerman .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tuachair ‘descendant of Tuachar’, a personal name composed of the elements tuath ‘people’ + car ‘dear, beloved’.
Americanized form of Jewish Tocker or Toker (see Tokarz ).

variants.name: Tooker
meanings: English (Devon) and Irish: variant of   Tucker  .

variants.name: Tuckerman
meanings: English: from Middle English tuker(e), toker(e) ‘tucker, fuller’ (see Tucker 1) + -man, either for a tucker, or for his servant or assistant.

variants.name: Fuller
meanings: English: occupational name for a dresser of cloth, from Middle English fuller ‘fuller of cloth’ (partly from Old English fullere, partly from Old French fouleor, foleur, Latin fullo). Raw cloth had to be fulled, i.e. scoured, cleansed, and thickened by beating or trampling it in water, a process also known as walking or tucking, hence the surnames Walker and Tucker alongside Fuller. These three terms and surnames are characteristic of different parts of England. In general, in Middle English, Fuller is southern and eastern, while Walker belongs to the west and north and Tucker is southwestern. Compare Fullen .
English: variant of Fullard with loss of -d.
German (Füller): occupational name for a person whose work involved filling, such as a dauber, or a nickname for a gourmand or glutton. Compare Filler .

variants.name: Swinger
meanings: English: occupational name, perhaps for a fuller, who finished cloth by beating it and stretching it on tenters. Middle English swyngere is not independently recorded but it appears to be an agent derivative of Middle English swingen ‘to beat, strike, punish, afflict (something)’. Compare the synonymous Tucker , an agent derivative of Middle English tuken ‘to torment, beat’. The earliest bearers of the name Swinger were wealthy townsmen.
In some instances probably an Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schwinger , or German Zwinger, a nickname from Middle High German zwinger ‘oppressor’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Tucker was born in 1672, in Prince George, Virginia, United States, her father, Robert Tucker, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth Coleman, was 16. She married William Pettypool Jr. in 1684, in Prince George, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 March 1726, in her hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Halifax Town Cemetery, Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, United States.

Elle a épousé William Pettypool Jr. en 1684, à Prince George, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mars 1726, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Halifax Town Cemetery, Halifax, Halifax, Virginie, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tucker è nata il nel 1672 nel Prince George, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Robert Tucker, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Coleman, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato William Pettypool Jr. nel 1684, nel Prince George, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 marzo 1726, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Halifax Town Cemetery, Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tuckerが1672年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州プリンス ジョーッジで生まれた時，父Robert Tuckerは20歳，母Elizabeth Colemanは16歳であった。1684年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州プリンス ジョーッジでWilliam Pettypool Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1726年3月14日に故郷で54歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州ハリファックスハリファックスハリファックス トウン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tucker(이)가 1672년 미국 버지니아 주 프린스 조지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Tucker(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Coleman(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1684년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프린스 조지에서 William Pettypool Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1726년 3월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 할이파스 할이파스 할이파스 타운 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tucker nasceu em 1672, em Prince George, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Robert Tucker, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Coleman, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com William Pettypool Jr. em 1684, em Prince George, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de março de 1726, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Halifax Town Cemetery, Halifax, Halifax, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Tucker родилась в 1672 г. в местности принц джеордж, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Robert Tucker было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Coleman, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Pettypool Jr. в 1684 г. в местности принц джеордж, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 марта 1726 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности хэлифакс тоун кеметири, хэлифакс, хэлифакс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Tucker nació en 1672, en Prince George, Virginia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Robert Tucker, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Coleman, tenía 16 años. Se casó con William Pettypool Jr. en 1684, en Prince George, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de marzo de 1726, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Halifax Town Cemetery, Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
